title: Design an Event Schema
description: Define events that stay stable as the system evolves.
content:
I need to design events for: {{domain}}

Define each event: its name (past tense — something happened), the fields it carries, and what it must NOT carry. Decide between thin events (id only) and fat events (full payload) and the trade-off. Plan for evolution: how a consumer tolerates new fields, how you version a breaking change, and idempotency keys for duplicates. Flag any event that leaks producer internals consumers will couple to.
